title: Bootstrap ADR — seed the ADR registry
context: POL-GOV-002 now references schemas/adr.schema.json. An empty governance/adrs/ directory would cause tools/validate-schemas.py --strict to fail. This bootstrap ADR seeds the registry and documents the schema adoption itself.
decision: Adopt schemas/adr.schema.json v1 as the authoritative front-matter contract for all future ADRs. Use JSON sidecar files (ADR-NNNN.json) alongside ADR-NNNN.md Markdown bodies. Validator runs in CI (schema-validate job).
